ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Title/name of the course */,
  "duration_regular" TEXT /* Duration for regular track (in days/months) */,
  "duration_fast" TEXT /* Duration for fast track (in days/months) */,
  "duration_super_fast" TEXT /* Duration for super fast track (in days/months) */,
  "cost_usd" REAL /* Cost of the course in USD */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track (e.g., Regular, Fast, Super Fast) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the track's characteristics */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in days */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track chosen for the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of course completion (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course for the student */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the course for the student */,
  "progress_percentage" INTEGER /* Progress percentage of the student in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the enrollment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the student registered in the LMS */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the student (e.g., student, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor was hired */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the instructor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instructor account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the instructor (e.g., instructor, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment is related to */,
  "assignment_title" TEXT /* Title of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points for the assignment */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the assignment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assignment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment is for */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Quiz, Final Exam) */,
  "date_given" TEXT /* Date the assessment was given */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score possible on the assessment */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the assessment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assessment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who earned the certificate */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the certificate */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate was issued */,
  "certificate_link" TEXT /* Link to download the certificate */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the certificate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the payment */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid for the course */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment record is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Student, Instructor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
